testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from homes, offices and vacation rentals across Central Florida.

items.name: Melissa R.
items.text: Rox has cleaned our home bi-weekly for months and it has never looked better. They remember every little preference and the house smells amazing after every visit.

items.name: Carlos M.
items.text: I manage six Airbnbs and Rox handles every turnover. The photo report after each clean gives me total peace of mind — my guest reviews mention cleanliness constantly.

items.name: Jennifer T.
items.text: Our office has never been this consistently clean. They come after hours, never miss a day, and the whole team is unfailingly professional and kind.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Anything else on your mind? Just message us on WhatsApp — we answer fast.

items.q: How much does a cleaning cost?
items.a: Every space is different, so we price by size, condition and frequency. Send us a few details on WhatsApp and you'll get a free, no-obligation quote — usually within the hour.

items.q: What's included in a standard cleaning?
items.a: All rooms are dusted, vacuumed and mopped; bathrooms and kitchen are fully sanitized; mirrors and surfaces polished; and trash removed. Deep cleans add baseboards, inside appliances and more.
We use professional, eco-friendly products that are safe for kids and pets. If you prefer specific products or have allergies, we're happy to adjust — just let us know.
Orlando, Kissimmee and surrounding Central Florida communities — including Lake Nona, Winter Garden, Dr. Phillips, Celebration, Davenport and Champions Gate. Not sure about your area? Just ask!

items.q: Do you offer discounts for recurring service?
items.a: Yes! Weekly and bi-weekly clients receive preferred rates, priority scheduling and the same trusted team on every visit.

items.q: How do I book a cleaning?
items.a: Just tap the WhatsApp button and say hi. We'll confirm your quote, pick a date and time that works for you, and you're all set — no contracts required.

contact.title: Prefer to write? Send us a message
contact.subtitle: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within one business day. For the fastest quote, WhatsApp is the way to go.

whoFor: Busy families who want their weekends back

faq.q: How often can you clean my home?
faq.a: Weekly, bi-weekly, monthly or one-time — whatever fits your life. Recurring clients get preferred rates and the same trusted team on every visit.

faq.q: Do I need to be home during the cleaning?
faq.a: Not at all. Many clients share a door code or key. Our team is background-checked and insured, and we lock up and confirm by message when we're done.

faq.q: Do you bring your own supplies?
faq.a: Yes — we arrive with all professional equipment and eco-friendly products. If you prefer we use your products, just leave them out and we'll happily use those instead.

house.ctaTitle: Your spotless home is one message away
house.ctaButton: Get My Free House Cleaning Quote

Professional practices that need spotless waiting rooms

faq.q: Can you clean outside business hours?
faq.a: Absolutely — evenings, early mornings and weekends are all available, so your team never works around a vacuum.

faq.q: Do we need to sign a long-term contract?
faq.a: No. We work on a simple recurring schedule you can adjust or pause anytime. We keep your business by earning it every visit.
Yes — Rox Cleaning is fully licensed and insured, and we're happy to provide documentation for your records before we start.

whoFor: Any storefront where presentation drives sales

faq.q: Can you clean before we open or after we close?
faq.a: Yes — most of our retail clients choose early-morning or after-closing visits so the store is always ready when the doors open.

faq.q: Will your team work around merchandise and displays?
faq.a: Carefully, yes. Our cleaners are trained to work around product displays and will follow any handling guidelines you give us.

faq.q: Do you offer one-time and recurring service?
faq.a: Both. Many stores start with a one-time deep clean and move to a weekly schedule — recurring clients get preferred rates.

str.title: 5-star turnovers for your vacation rental
str.subtitle: Same-day Airbnb and VRBO turnover cleaning in Orlando, Kissimmee, Davenport and the Disney corridor — with restocking and a photo report after every clean.
included: Full clean of every room between guests
Fresh linens and hotel-style bed making
Towels replaced, folded and staged
Kitchen reset: dishes, appliances and counters
Bathrooms sanitized and restaged
Essentials restocked: toiletries, paper goods, coffee
Trash out and bins refreshed
Damage and maintenance alerts with photos
Photo report sent after every clean
Staging matched to your listing photos
Lost & found handling for guest items
Scheduling synced to your booking calendar
whoFor: Airbnb & VRBO hosts — single unit or a full portfolio
Property managers in the Disney and Kissimmee corridor
Out-of-state owners who need trusted eyes on the property
Hosts who've been burned by no-show cleaners

faq.a: Yes — same-day turnovers are our specialty. We're built for the 10am–4pm window between check-out and check-in, even in peak season.

faq.q: How do you know when to clean?
faq.a: We sync with your Airbnb/VRBO calendar or property management system, so every clean is scheduled automatically the moment a booking comes in.

faq.q: What happens if a guest damages something?
faq.a: We document it with photos and alert you immediately — so you can file a claim with the platform before the next guest checks in.
